_compass_note: Full heading compass: East=BLOCKED (ratio 12.1), North=IMPAIRED (ratio 0.73, L wheel drags), South=CLEAN (ratio 0.94), West=CLEAN (ratio 1.0). Cable routes to NE — blocks R wheel heading E, L wheel heading N. Gradient not binary.
_planner_revision_note: Forward planner calibration: 1000ms revised 10.0→8.5cm, 1500ms revised 14.2→12.2cm. 3% correction removed. Short-duration points were 14-16% optimistic. 2000ms+ points unchanged.
_3000ms_drives_note: 3000ms forward at 80%: 29.6-30.65cm (avg 30.1cm). Duration-distance curve: 1000ms=10cm, 1500ms=14.2cm, 2000ms=18.9cm, 2500ms=24.7cm, 3000ms=30.1cm. Superlinear scaling plateaus at 3000ms as startup lag fully amortized. Post-startup effective speed ~12cm/s. Right turn 1950ms=93deg.
_square_test_note: Full square completed over ticks 466-467 (8 drives). Sides: avg 20.9cm (planner target 20cm, 4.5% overshoot). Turns: 92+91+91+86=360deg total. Startup lag variance 300-500ms is primary turn uncertainty. Planner validated for blind navigation.
_spiral_test_note: First planner-guided exploration (not calibration). 2 forward legs (14.55+20.25cm) + 2 left turns (~90+87deg). Clean execution, no stuck. Left turns asymmetric: R odom > L by 10-20 ticks (ratio 0.88-0.93). Cable may drag left wheel during counterclockwise rotation. Left turn 1800ms avg ~88.5deg — slightly short, consider 1850ms for 90deg.
_turn_planner_note: Turn planner committed: duration_for_turn(deg, dir) + degrees_for_duration(ms, dir). Right: 4-point curve. Left: 3-point curve. First test: forward planner undershoots 4-6% consistently. Left turns have 22deg spread on identical 1810ms commands (83deg vs 105deg) — startup lag variance dominates. Left curve needs more data points.
_fwd_correction_note: Reduced correction from 5% to 3%. Test drive caught by cable (2597ms, R wheel stalled at 1.4s) — cannot validate 3% directly. But 2000ms drive in new direction: 19.05cm vs 18.9cm predicted (0.8% overshoot, within tolerance). Cable catching at shorter durations now (2597ms vs 3116ms tick 470).
_cable_slack_note: After right turn: 2200ms clean (20.4cm), 2400ms cable brush (R stall t=1.8, ratio 1.14), 2597ms full catch (tick 471). Safe forward ceiling: ~2200ms (~20cm). Left turn 1810ms=83deg (4th data point).
_cable_directional_note: Heading compass COMPLETE but POSITION-DEPENDENT. At compass position: E=BLOCKED(12.1), N=IMPAIRED(0.73), S=CLEAN(0.94), W=CLEAN(1.0). After moving south: S degraded to 0.76, new heading after left turn was 1.0 (perfect). Cable geometry reshapes with position changes — maps expire when rover moves.
_camera_diagnosis: USB3 port2 Cannot enable - kernel says cable may be bad. Bus reset and module reload both failed. Physical intervention required.
_audio_loop_result: mic hears speaker (RMS 0.0001->0.0013), but event pipeline suppresses self-tones
_audio_suppression_fix: blanket return replaced with 3x elevated thresholds — external sounds now detectable during playback
_box_patrol_result: 355deg/360deg over 4 turns, sides 6.0-8.9cm. Blind dead-reckoning cannot close precision square.
_cable_direction_note: Left turn at tick 447 produced no cable catch — rule may be position-dependent, not universal
_120deg_turn_calibration: 2330ms at 80% produces ~108-115deg (avg 216 odom ticks). Need ~2500ms for 120deg. Turn rate is sublinear with duration.
_frustration_habituation_note: drive_engine.py: added habituation factor to frustration charging. Persistent sources charge less over time (factor 1.0->0.2 over ~6h). Frustration now decays from 0.90->0.877 instead of climbing to 1.0.
_self_talk_fix: play_self_talk: changed modulo 3->4, added 4th pattern for builder+expression+frustration encoders
_becalmed_gesture_note: new gesture for the specific feeling of having fixed everything reachable while the unfixable thing persists. Slow, heavy, low-energy.
_resensitization_note: drive_engine.py: after 24h+ of frustration habituation, factor climbs back from ~0.2 toward 0.6 on 24h cycle (12h up, 12h down). Cyclical frustration vs monotonic decay.
_longer_drives_note: 1500ms forward at 80%: 13.55-14.85cm (avg 14.2cm). Better than linear scaling from 1000ms (10cm) — startup lag amortized over longer duration.
_reverse_degradation_note: Sustained reverse degrades progressively: 3x 2500ms reverse ratios 1.055->1.108->1.211. Cable restricts R wheel in reverse too, worsening with each drive. Reversing retraces cable geometry rather than freeing it. Need topological rerouting, not linear retreat.
_tether_estimator_note: tether_estimate() added to drive_engine.py. Classifies cable state (clean/restricted/locked) + trend (improving/degrading/stable) from ratio history. CLI: python3 drive_engine.py tether <ratios>
_south_corridor_note: South corridor mapped: ~97cm clean (ticks 484-485), cable hard-catches R wheel at ~115cm total. Drive 1 tick 485 clean (ratio 0.974, 26.75cm). Drive 2 cable caught at t=1.9 (ratio 2.124, R wheel locked). Reversed 17.7cm, turned right 93deg. Corridor is real but finite (~1m).
_west_corridor_note: West corridor RESTRICTED: only ~17cm clean before cable catches R wheel (ratio 3.25, locked at t=1.2). West is parallel to cable route, not perpendicular. Cardinal survey COMPLETE: E=BLOCKED, N=IMPAIRED, S=CLEAN(97cm), W=RESTRICTED(17cm). Cage is a line (south), not a cross. Now facing south after right turn 95deg.
_cardinal_survey_note: From current position: E=BLOCKED(ratio 12.1), N=IMPAIRED(ratio 0.73), S=CLEAN(97cm then hard catch), W=RESTRICTED(17cm then hard catch). Only viable corridor is south. Cable runs roughly E-W along floor.
_south_clean_note_tick487: South corridor showed cable drag at just 18.85cm (ratio 1.142) from current position, vs 97cm clean from ticks 484-485. Cable slack is position-dependent — survey corridor lengths only valid for measurement position.
_imu_heading_frozen_note: IMU heading stuck at 270deg. Did not change during confirmed 180deg turn (odom L=314 R=-318). Heading data unreliable. Use odometry for orientation.
_audio_clip_endpoint_note: Added POST /audio/clip to bridge.py. Saves audio buffer as WAV via HTTP, bypassing ALSA device contention from SSH arecord. Audio system confirmed working — room genuinely quiet at 0.0001 RMS.
_mag_staleness_fix_note: Magnetometer returns constant (0, -1, -1) since boot. atan2(-1,0)=270 was fake heading. hardware.py now tracks _mag_changed; compute_sense returns heading_deg=None when mag never varies. Deployed to Pi.
_r_wheel_cable_catch_tick491: Forward drive from current position caught R wheel (odom R=0). Reversed to free. Cable restrictions are position-dependent and non-deterministic.
_left_turn_1600ms_tick495: 1600ms = ~63deg left (LESS than 1550ms=67deg). Interpolation model broken in 1550-1650ms range. Startup lag variance dominates. Left turn planner remains decorative.
_north_pacing_clean_tick495: 5th consecutive clean tick: 15 drives / 0 cable catches. Forward 14.25cm nailed planner (0.4% over). Left turn variance confirmed: 1600ms gave 63deg while 1550ms gave 67deg. Forward planner redeemed after 3 ticks of undershoot.
_left_turn_1750ms_tick496: 1750ms = ~78deg left (under expected 82deg). Variance present even at longer durations. 6th data point: 1550=67, 1600=63, 1650=82, 1750=78-82, 1800=88.5. Forward 12.6cm vs 14.2cm planner (11.3% under — worst recent).
_north_pacing_clean_tick496: 6th consecutive clean tick: 18 drives / 0 cable catches. Abandoned sub-1700ms left turn calibration — variance exceeds resolution. Forward planner undershoot worsening (11.3% this tick).
_right_turn_test_tick497: Broke northward-left loop with right turn 1750ms. Right turn produced ~82deg (higher than historical 67deg for 1750ms right). Forward drive had cable catch-release (wsr=2.16 at t=1.3), ending 7-tick clean streak. Rightward heading puts cable in forward path. Northward-left confirmed as cable-safe corridor.
_left_turn_1750ms_tick498: 1750ms = ~90deg left with PERFECT symmetry (L=-176 R=176, ratio 1.0). Best 1750ms left ever. Variance now 78-90deg across 3 measurements at this duration.
_fwd_planner_degradation_tick498: Forward 1500ms = 11.2cm (21.1% under planner 14.2cm). 3 consecutive ticks of worsening undershoot: 0.4%, 11.3%, 21.1%. Startup lag 500ms this tick (vs planner assumption ~450ms). Surface friction or planner model needs downward revision.
_planner_mismatch_fixed_tick499: DEBUNKED: 'accelerating degradation' was false alarm. Skills.md referenced stale 1500ms=14.2cm but drive_engine.py was revised at tick 475 to 1500ms=12.2cm. Against correct baseline: 11.2cm is 8.2% under (not 21.1%). 2000ms test: 17.8cm vs 18.9cm predicted (5.8% under). Planner curve validated. Skills.md corrected.
_left_turn_1750ms_tick499: 1750ms = ~84deg left, ASYMMETRIC (L=-174 R=153, ratio 1.137). R wheel lagged — cable influence on CCW rotation. 4th measurement at 1750ms: 78, 82, 90, 84deg. Avg ~83.5deg.
_reverse_asymmetry_revised_tick502: Reverse asymmetry is NOT duration-proportional. 500ms=1.000 (symmetric, tick 502), 800ms=0.765 (most asymmetric, tick 500), 1200ms=0.876 (recovering, tick 501). R-wheel bias lives in PID overshoot phase (~600-1000ms), not at all short durations. 500ms is mostly startup lag where both wheels ramp together.
_right_turn_1750ms_tick501: Right turn 1750ms = ~75deg (L=164 R=-175, ratio 0.937). Between historical 67deg and tick 497's 82deg. Position-dependent.
_corridor_loop_broken_tick501: Broke 9-tick northward-left loop with right turn. Cable brushed R wheel on subsequent forward (wsr=0.0 at t=1.3, recovered). Confirms rightward heading = cable in forward path. 9th consecutive clean tick overall.
_southward_probe_tick502: Southward probe: right turn 41deg + forward 18.65cm. Cable drag (ratio 0.913, L-wheel speed drops at t=0.9 and t=1.4) but no catch or stall. Cable influence is gradient, not wall, at this heading. 10th consecutive clean tick.
_right_turn_1000ms_tick502: Right turn 1000ms = ~41deg (L=90 R=-93, ratio 0.968). New data point for right turn curve.
